title: FLX Networks Announces Invesco Has Joined Platform

title: European Currency ETFs Climb as Central Banks Hike Rates
text: Europe currency-related exchange traded funds jumped Thursday after central banks across the region raised interest rates to curb rising inflationary pressures. On Thursday, the Invesco CurrencyShares Euro Currency Trust (FXE) was up 1.0%, the Invesco Currency Shares British Pound Sterling (FXB) gained 1.4%, and Invesco CurrencyShares Swiss Franc Trust (FXF) increased 2.9%.

title: 6 High-Yield Dividend Stocks With Solid Earnings to Boot
text: These six high-yield dividend stocks have payout ratios that are very low, indicating that the companies can well afford to pay the dividends. The post 6 High-Yield Dividend Stocks With Solid Earnings to Boot appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Team of Investment Industry Veterans Launches o15 Capital Partners, a Mission-Driven Alternatives Investment Firm
text: o15 combines capital with community to build a new model for supporting women and minority entrepreneurs ATLANTA , June 14, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Finance veterans Colin Meadows, Kenneth Saffold, and Brian Morris, today announced the official launch of o15 Capital Partners ("o15"), a mission-driven alternatives investment firm that will provide capital to companies led by and serving undercapitalized entrepreneurs and communities. o15 seeks to provide institutions the opportunity to invest in a more diverse economy through credit and equity investments in lower-middle-market businesses in the United States, with a particular emphasis on businesses led by women or minorities.

title: 6 Undervalued Financial Stocks to Buy Now
text: 6 undervalued financial stocks to buy now. These stocks all trade below book value and/or have very low price-to-earnings (P/E) multiples.

title: Invesco's (IVZ) May AUM Declines on Money Market Outflows
text: Net outflows in the money market hurt Invesco's (IVZ) AUM balance in May.

title: Invesco Ltd. Announces May 31, 2022 Assets Under Management
text: ATLANTA , June 9, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Invesco Ltd. (NYSE: IVZ) today reported preliminary month-end assets under management (AUM) of $1,451.6 billion, a decrease of 1.7% versus previous month-end.

title: Invesco Hires Head of Institutional Specialists for ETFs and Indexed Strategies
text: Invesco has hired an ETF veteran for the newly created global position of head of institutional specialists for ETFs and indexed strategies. Emily Foote McKinley has been named the new head of institutional specialists for ETFs and indexed strategies, effective today, June 2, 2022.
